message.content:
PASS

I can see that the new matière 'Comptabilité' has been successfully added to the filière. The verification shows:

1. A toast notification is visible in the bottom right corner confirming "Élément créé — Le nouvel élément a été ajouté au référentiel." (Element created — The new element has been added to the repository)

2. In the BTS MCO filière card, the Matières section now shows 3 matières instead of the original 3, and 'Comptabilité' appears as one of the matières with a coefficient badge (Coef. X - though the exact coefficient value isn't fully visible in the screenshot).

The interface shows the BTS MCO filière with its Management Commercial Opérationnel description, and the Matières section displays the three subjects including the newly added Comptabilité. The toast notification confirms the successful creation and addition of the new matière to the reference repository.
